title: BUG #19074: pg_dump from v18 loses the NOT NULL flag in the inherited table field when dumping v17-databases
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE p (a Int32, b String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
CREATE TABLE c (a Int32 NOT NULL) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
INSERT INTO c (a) SELECT a FROM p;
SELECT * FROM c WHERE a IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: pg_dump loses NOT NULL in inherited table field
